overall.summary: Overall score uses minimum dimension score 2 capped by highest severity CRITICAL.

proposal_semantics.proposal_summary: Grants the RISK_ADMIN role to a CapsPlusRiskStewards smart contract on each network with an active Aave v3 instance, enabling the RISK_COUNCIL to adjust asset caps upwards without voting overhead.

disclosed_entities.name: CapsPlusRiskStewards
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: grants the `RISK_ADMIN` role to a `CapsPlusRiskStewards` smart contract on each network

disclosed_entities.name: RISK_COUNCIL
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The `RISK_COUNCIL` is a Gnosis Safe controlled by the DAOs risk-providers

claimed_actions.raw_action: grants the RISK_ADMIN role to a CapsPlusRiskStewards smart contract
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: grants the `RISK_ADMIN` role to a `CapsPlusRiskStewards` smart contract on each network with an active instance of Aave v3

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Adds CapsPlusRiskStewards as a risk admin
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: This proposal's payload executes `ACL_MANAGER.addRiskAdmin(STEWARD)` where `STEWARD` is the `CapsPlusRiskStewards`

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal assigns a role to a predefined contract to streamline a single parameter update process.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: Simply grants the RISK_ADMIN role. The proposal payload executes ACL_MANAGER.addRiskAdmin(STEWARD).

limitations: No specific risk cap values or token names are listed in the proposal.

conflict_detection.summary: An undisclosed address participates in an uncovered critical business action.

findings.title: Unaccounted trace addresses
findings.description: One or more addresses appeared in the trace without direct proposal text disclosure.
findings.recommendation: Pause or escalate manual review because an uncovered critical business action is linked to an undisclosed address.

depth_analysis.summary: Observed trace depth exceeds claimed complexity.

findings.title: Trace complexity exceeds textual complexity disclosure
findings.description: Observed trace depth exceeds claimed complexity.
findings.recommendation: Review whether the proposal text should describe the actual call depth or indirect execution paths.

claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: Simply grants the RISK_ADMIN role. The proposal payload executes ACL_MANAGER.addRiskAdmin(STEWARD).

function_semantic_match.summary: Trace includes an unclaimed high-risk business action.

findings.title: Claimed actions do not fully match trace actions
findings.description: Trace includes an unclaimed high-risk business action.
findings.recommendation: Compare proposal action wording with decoded functions and risk actions before relying on the text.
